data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Inland Real Estate ate Income Trust ( (INRE) ).

For the year ended December 31, 2025, Inland Real Estate Income Trust, Inc. paid approximately $19.6 million in cash distributions to stockholders, with 27.1% classified as ordinary dividends and 72.9% treated as nondividend distributions, considered a return of capital for tax purposes to the extent of investors’ basis and thereafter as capital gain. The company’s quarterly payments in 2025, including the January 7, April 7, July 7, and October 7 distribution dates, each totaled $0.1356 per share and were entirely composed of ordinary dividend and return-of-capital components, with no amount categorized as capital gain, a breakdown that has implications for stockholders’ tax planning and after-tax income profiles.

More about Inland Real Estate ate Income Trust

Inland Real Estate Income Trust, Inc. is a real estate investment company that provides investors with income through regular cash distributions, typically derived from its portfolio of income-producing properties. The company focuses on generating steady returns for stockholders, with distributions that may be characterized differently for income tax purposes depending on underlying earnings and capital structure.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

Trade Desk ( (TTD) ) has issued an update.

On January 24, 2026, The Trade Desk appointed longstanding finance executive Tahnil Davis as its principal accounting officer and interim chief financial officer, succeeding Alex Kayyal, whose employment as CFO and principal financial and accounting officer ended the same day, though he is expected to remain on the board until the 2026 annual meeting. Davis, who has held senior finance and accounting roles at the company since 2015, will oversee the finance function while the company conducts an external search for a permanent CFO, under a new employment agreement that includes a higher base salary, increased target bonus and a quarterly retention bonus tied to her interim CFO service, signaling an effort to ensure continuity in financial leadership as The Trade Desk finalizes its 2025 results and reaffirms its previously issued fourth-quarter 2025 revenue and adjusted EBITDA guidance.

On January 23, 2026, Bitmine Immersion Technologies appointed its current Chief Financial Officer and Chief Operating Officer, Young Kim, to the company’s board of directors, formalizing his expanded governance role without any special arrangements or related-party ties disclosed. In a January 26, 2026 operational update, Bitmine reported total crypto, cash and “moonshot” holdings of $12.8 billion, including 4.243 million ETH—equivalent to 3.52% of total ETH supply—193 Bitcoin, $682 million in cash, and minority stakes in Beast Industries and Eightco Holdings, reinforcing its status as the world’s largest Ethereum treasury and the second-largest global corporate crypto treasury. data.title: Swedish Export Credit Corporation Posts Lower 2025 Profit but Delivers Record New Business and Strong Capital
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from ELEMENTS Linked to the ICE BofAML Commodity Index eXtra Biofuels Total Return ( (FUE) ).

On January 26, 2026, Swedish Export Credit Corporation reported its year-end 2025 results, showing lower profitability but strong business volumes and a solid capital position. For January–December 2025, net interest income fell to Skr 2,719 million from Skr 3,058 million a year earlier, operating profit declined to Skr 1,491 million from Skr 2,121 million, and net profit dropped to Skr 1,183 million from Skr 1,683 million, pressured by lower Swedish short-term interest rates, a stronger krona and higher provisions for expected credit losses tied to a few exposures in the fourth quarter. The lending portfolio shrank 7.3% to Skr 262.7 billion, although sustainability-classified lending increased to Skr 56.3 billion, and the total capital ratio improved to 23.1% while total assets eased to Skr 350.0 billion. Despite weaker earnings and a proposed dividend of Skr 473 million, SEK recorded one of the highest volumes of new credit and guarantee commitments in its history at Skr 125.8 billion for 2025, including Skr 28.5 billion in the fourth quarter, supported by deals in European energy infrastructure, offshore wind, and fossil-free steel, as well as financing agreements with new corporate clients. Long-term borrowing surged to Skr 94 billion from Skr 53 billion in 2024, broadening the investor base and maintaining outstanding senior debt at Skr 304.6 billion, while the company’s strengthened credit facility with the Swedish National Debt Office and a new memorandum of understanding with Saudi Export-Import Bank further bolster its capacity to back Swedish exporters amid elevated geopolitical tensions and a gradually improving economic outlook.

More about ELEMENTS Linked to the ICE BofAML Commodity Index eXtra Biofuels Total Return

Aktiebolaget Svensk Exportkredit (AB SEK), or Swedish Export Credit Corporation, is a state-owned financial institution that provides export credits, guarantees and long-term financing to support the competitiveness of Swedish export companies. The company focuses on lending to large industrial, infrastructure and energy projects, including sustainability-classified and green financing, and funds its activities through active participation in international capital markets with long-term senior debt issuance in multiple currencies.

Learn more about FUE stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Vale Says Minas Gerais Water Overflows Contained, Dams Unaffected
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Vale SA ( (VALE) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On January 26, 2026, Vale S.A. reported that water overflows detected on January 25 in the municipalities of Congonhas and Ouro Preto, in the Brazilian state of Minas Gerais, had been contained without injuries or impacts to nearby populations and communities. The company stressed that the incidents were not related to any of its dams in the region, that no mining tailings were released—only water with soil sediments—and that the stability and safety conditions of its dams remain unchanged and are monitored continuously. Vale said it routinely carries out preventive inspection and maintenance on its structures, with additional reinforcement during heavy rains, and that it is investigating the causes of the overflows so that any lessons learned can be incorporated into its rainfall management plans, while remaining available to authorities for further clarification, a stance aimed at reassuring stakeholders about its operational and environmental risk controls in a sensitive mining area.

The most recent analyst rating on (VALE) stock is a Hold with a $16.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Vale SA stock, see the VALE Stock Forecast page.

Ferrari ( (IT:RACE) ) has shared an update.

On January 26, 2026, Ferrari reported the latest progress in its €250 million share buyback program, which forms the first tranche of a planned €3.5 billion multi-year repurchase initiative to be executed by 2030. Between January 19 and January 23, 2026, the company repurchased 54,200 common shares on Euronext Milan for a total consideration of about €15.68 million, at an average price of €289.28 per share, bringing total purchases since the start of the multi-year program on January 5, 2026 to 138,700 shares for €42.26 million across Euronext Milan and the NYSE. As of January 23, 2026, Ferrari held 16,783,306 common shares in treasury, representing 8.65% of its issued common shares (9.12% including special voting shares), underscoring a significant ongoing capital return effort that tightens the free float and may support earnings per share and shareholder value over time.

On January 26, 2026, Maris-Tech Ltd. announced that it has reached a key integration milestone with U.S.-based space and defense technology firm Sidus Space for the LizzieSat-4 mission, as Maris-Tech’s advanced edge computing and video processing payload moves from planning into active hardware testing and integration. data.title: SMX Partners with TruCotton to Launch Molecular Traceability Initiative for U.S. Cotton
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

SMX Public Limited Company ( (SMX) ) has provided an update.

On 26 January 2026, SMX (Security Matters) PLC announced a new initiative with TruCotton, a U.S. cotton traceability and branding program produced by WildWood Cotton Technologies, to develop full-chain verification of U.S.-grown cotton by embedding SMX’s molecular markers directly into the fiber. The collaboration aims to create a scientific, material-level method to prove cotton’s origin and authenticity throughout domestic and international supply chains, shifting traceability from documentation-based systems to tamper-resistant, machine-readable evidence that links physical cotton to secure digital records. By extending SMX’s proven textile-marking platform to U.S. cotton, the project is intended to enable a new class of premium, authenticated cotton inputs, strengthen brand and supply-chain integrity, and better support trade, compliance and consumer confidence in products marketed as U.S.-origin cotton, potentially enhancing the competitive positioning and value of U.S. cotton in global markets.

More about SMX Public Limited Company

SMX (Security Matters) PLC is a global provider of material-embedded molecular identity and digital traceability technology, offering marking, tracking, measuring and data platforms that help value-chain participants authenticate materials, support regulatory compliance and transition toward a lower-carbon, more transparent economy. Its solutions are applied across sectors including textiles, recycled materials and industrial supply chains, where persistent, physical-level markers are used to verify origin, quality and integrity of products as they move through complex global networks.

Average Trading Volume: 2,385,454

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $156.7M

data.description:

An update from Oak Valley Bancorp [Ca] ( (OVLY) ) is now available.

Oak Valley Bancorp reported unaudited results for the fourth quarter and full year ended December 31, 2025, showing fourth-quarter net income of $6.3 million, or $0.76 per diluted share, down from the prior quarter but up from a year earlier, and full-year 2025 net income of $23.9 million, or $2.88 per share, a 4.1% decline from 2024. The earnings dip versus the prior quarter was driven by an $865,000 provision for credit losses tied to a single collateral-dependent commercial real estate loan placed on non-accrual in December, which lifted non-performing assets to $4.6 million and increased the allowance for credit losses to 1.08% of gross loans, though management said overall credit quality remains stable; at the same time, growth in earning assets fueled year-over-year increases in net interest income and margin, non-interest income rose on higher fee and securities-related revenues, expenses climbed with expanded operations, total assets surpassed the $2 billion milestone on strong loan and deposit growth and liquidity, and on January 20, 2026, the board declared a cash dividend of $0.375 per share payable in February 2026, signaling continued capital return to shareholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (OVLY) stock is a Hold with a $33.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Oak Valley Bancorp [Ca] stock, see the OVLY Stock Forecast page.

The company operates 19 branches across Central California and the Eastern Sierra region, including locations such as Oakdale, Modesto, Stockton, Sacramento, Roseville, and Mammoth Lakes, with a community banking focus.

data.title: Cardiol Therapeutics Secures $13.5 Million Bought-Deal Financing to Advance Heart Disease Programs
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Cardiol Therapeutics ( (TSE:CRDL) ) has shared an announcement.

On January 16, 2026, Cardiol Therapeutics announced a bought-deal private placement with Canaccord Genuity Corp., under which the underwriter agreed to purchase 10,384,616 units at $1.30 per unit for gross proceeds of $13.5 million, with an additional 10% over-allotment option that could raise up to a further $1.35 million. Each unit comprises one common share and one-half warrant exercisable at $1.75 for 24 months, and the financing, expected to close on or about January 23, 2026 subject to regulatory approvals including from the TSX, is intended to fund Cardiol’s research and clinical development programs as well as general corporate purposes, reinforcing the company’s balance sheet as it advances late-stage cardiovascular trials and seeks to strengthen its competitive position in inflammatory heart disease therapeutics.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:CRDL) stock is a Hold with a C$1.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Cardiol Therapeutics stock, see the TSE:CRDL Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:CRDL Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:CRDL is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by very weak financial performance (pre-revenue profile, large ongoing losses, and substantial cash burn with shrinking equity), which increases financing and dilution risk despite low debt. Technicals provide only a modest offset due to improving short-term momentum, while valuation remains unattractive because the company is loss-making and offers no dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:CRDL stock, click here.

More about Cardiol Therapeutics

Cardiol Therapeutics Inc. is a late-stage life sciences company focused on developing anti-inflammatory and anti-fibrotic therapies for heart disease. Its lead small-molecule drug candidate, CardiolRx, targets inflammasome pathway activation implicated in pericarditis, myocarditis, and heart failure, and is being evaluated in the Phase III MAVERIC trial for recurrent pericarditis and has completed Phase II studies in pericarditis and acute myocarditis. The company is also advancing CRD-38, a subcutaneously administered formulation for inflammatory heart disease, including heart failure, and holds Orphan Drug Designation from the U.S. FDA for CardiolRx in pericarditis.

data.title: Franco-Nevada to Fund Orezone’s Casa Berardi Acquisition with $100 Million Gold Stream
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from Franco-Nevada ( (TSE:FNV) ) is now available.

On January 26, 2026, Franco-Nevada announced a US$100 million gold stream financing with Orezone Gold Corporation to support Orezone’s acquisition of Hecla Mining’s producing Casa Berardi Gold Mine and related Quebec assets, including the Heva-Hosco Gold Project. The deal will add immediate gold revenue from the long-life Casa Berardi operation in Quebec’s Abitibi region to Franco-Nevada’s Canadian portfolio, while giving the streamer exposure to a large reserve and resource base with significant exploration and expansion potential across underground and open-pit operations. Under the terms, Franco-Nevada will receive fixed deliveries of 1,625 ounces of gold per quarter for five years, then a variable share of future production from Casa Berardi and Heva-Hosco, with Orezone retaining 20% of spot price on delivered ounces; the secured stream includes a parent guarantee and a right of first refusal on future streams and royalties linked to these assets. Franco-Nevada plans to fund the transaction entirely from its existing cash holdings, underlining its balance-sheet strength, while the arrangement deepens its partnership with Orezone’s experienced management team and further consolidates Franco-Nevada’s position as a key provider of non-dilutive mine financing in the gold sector.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:FNV) stock is a Buy with a C$389.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Franco-Nevada stock, see the TSE:FNV Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:FNV Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:FNV is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by strong financial quality (especially the debt-light balance sheet and high margins) and a constructive, guidance-raising earnings call. Offsetting factors are premium valuation (high P/E, low yield) and only mixed technical momentum, with cash-flow consistency (negative TTM free cash flow) a key risk to monitor.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:FNV stock, click here.

More about Franco-Nevada

Franco-Nevada Corporation is a leading gold-focused royalty and streaming company with a large, diversified portfolio of cash-flow producing assets. Its asset-light business model gives investors exposure to gold prices and exploration upside while limiting operating and inflation risk. The Toronto- and New York–listed group is debt-free, funds growth from free cash flow, and emphasizes portfolio expansion and dividend payments as core elements of its capital allocation strategy.
